race.description: Picklebet's Pickle Perks F&M BM62 Hcp
race.comment: BIOLOGICS (6) is the big watch on resumption. She didn't fire in two runs last campaign but they were in Listed & G2 company having looked smart winning dominantly on debut this time last year. She's won a trial dominantly leading in and looks to have come back better in a winnable race. MARILYN'S EDGE (3) is up and running and will be on speed against the possibly classier opposition. She was an easy winner two back and will give them plenty to catch here. LANTANA (11) made good improvement second up at Ballarat and has each-way claims off that. FINAL MOMENT (10) resumes off a short spell and has the ability to run well.
